chunks.text: Technical Reports - Aydin Buluç. Kokkos GPU Implementation of CPU-Based BLAS/LAPACK Operations and RandBLAS Randomization (EECS-2025-58) Rahul Shah and James Demmel. Sparsity-aware communication for distributed graph neural network training (EECS-2023-253) Ujjaini Mukhopadhyay. Parallelizing Irregular Applications for Distributed Memory Scalability: Case Studies from Genomics (EECS-2020-133) Marquita Ellis.
chunks.question: What are the technical reports listed for Aydin Buluç?
chunks.answer: Three reports on GPU implementation and parallel applications.
